page_content:
ENEE799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

ENEE889 Teaching Workshop (1 Credit)

Provide training in education for senior PhD students who contemplate an academic career, and give them the opportunity to gain some teaching experience. Emphasis is on issues that are of special importance in electrical and computer engineering education.

Restriction: Must be in ENGR: MS/PhD-Electrical Engineering (Doctoral) program; and permission of ENGR-Electrical & Computer Engineering department.

Repeatable to: 4 credits if content differs.
